label: User Context
description: Inject the calling user's profile, memories, and recent chats into the workflow. Calls the platform's /api/user-context endpoint.

settings.name: contextSources
settings.label: Sources
settings.description: Array of sources to pull from. Common values: chat, workflow, memory, profile.

settings.name: contextQuery
settings.label: Query
settings.description: Optional semantic query to filter the returned context.

settings.name: contextMaxTokens
settings.label: Max tokens
settings.description: Cap on the context payload size returned by the API.

ai.shortDescription: Pulls per-user context (chat history, memories, profile) into the workflow.
ai.whenToUse: When a downstream LLM or agent needs personalization tied to the calling user.
ai.examplePrompt: load the user's recent chat history and memories before the agent answers
ai.promptHints: Use {{steps.<id>.context}} to reference the array. Leave sources blank for the default chat/workflow/memory bundle.

outputAssertions.name: non_empty_content
outputAssertions.errorMessage: User Context node failed to load — the upstream /api/user-context call errored or returned an unexpected shape.
